title: Airdrop Hunters II
relevance_summary: Token airdrop with manipulative tactics, including fake verification, high unlock fees, and aggressive transfer fees.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows fake verification pop-ups or blue ticks from untrusted sources.
Block any tx with high unlock fees and aggressive transfer fees.

attacker_addresses: 127 ETH sent to another address, then to Tornado Cash
summary: The $WTF token airdrop involved fake verification pop-ups and high unlock fees, leading to significant losses for users. A guard could have blocked transactions involving fake verification pop-ups and high unlock fees to prevent such incidents.
